headline: Digits Launches Expanded Payroll Connectivity Across 18 Leading Providers
summary: Digits Digits Launches Expanded Payroll Connectivity Across 18 Leading Providers SAN FRANCISCO, March 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Digits, the world’s first Agentic General Ledger™ (AGL®), today announced expanded payroll connectivity, enabling businesses and accounting firms to sync payroll data to 18 additional leading providers beyond its existing Gusto integration directly into the Digits ledger. The update brings broader coverage, deeper automation, and more accurate payroll accounting. Dig

headline: Paychex Schedules Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings Conference Call on March 25, 2026
summary: ROCHESTER, N.Y., March 11, 2026--Paychex, Inc. (Nasdaq: PAYX), an industry-leading human capital management ("HCM") company, will release financial results for its fiscal 2026 third quarter ended February 28, 2026 on Wednesday, March 25, 2026, before the financial markets open.
